description: Detects context.Background() and context.TODO() calls in Go non-main/non-init functions, indicating failure to propagate context from callers. Simplified from Rust: flags all selector_expression calls to context package. Cannot filter out main/init/test/constructor functions or check if enclosing function has a context parameter.

flag.message: context call detected -- verify context.Background()/context.TODO() is not used in non-root functions where context should be propagated from callers
